description: Simulate and document the Sun's behavior from Longyearbyen, Svalbard (~78.22° N, ~15.62° E) to create an educational worksheet about the Midnight Sun and Polar Night. Configure the view with the azimuthal grid, cardinal direction labels, and landscape enabled, but with the atmosphere disabled, and save these as the default settings. Document the Polar Night on the Winter Solstice (December 21, 2024) at 12:00 UTC by centering on the Sun and taking a screenshot. Document the Midnight Sun on the Summer Solstice (June 21, 2024) by taking four screenshots of the Sun centered in the view at 00:00, 06:00, 12:00, and 18:00 UTC. Save all screenshots to ~/Pictures/stellarium/. Write an educational summary to ~/Desktop/arctic_lesson_plan.txt including the location name and explanations of the Sun's visibility relative to the horizon on both solstices based on your observations.
